job_title: Software Development Engineer, Amazon Connect Contact Lens
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, Software Design, Software Architecture, Programming Languages, Software Development Life Cycle
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Software Design:1.0, Software Architecture:0.0, Programming Languages:1.0, Software Development Life Cycle:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years of non-internship professional software development experience, 2+ years of non-internship design or architecture (design patterns, reliability and scaling) of new and existing systems experience, Experience programming with at least one software programming language

core_responsibilities: Own code end-to-end from development, Work closely with senior technical leaders within the team and across, Have a sound understanding of computer science fundamentals, Practical industry experience, working across the stack with technology involving modern web, SOA, NoSQL databases, AI, ML, Big Data and more
job_summary: Amazon is a leader in cloud computing and technology solutions, and they are seeking a Software Development Engineer for their AWS Applied AI Solutions organization. The role involves developing innovative solutions for Amazon Connect, an AI-powered customer experience platform, while addressing complex engineering challenges and enhancing customer interactions.
